sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 59:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 59:1
items.html: The vessels of straightness are called “pipelines” because they draw and limit the light in the boundaries within them like a pipeline that bounds the water that travels through it.
